regression_log.reason: F1: hookify event mismatch (consumer would never fire). F2: sweep self-poisoning (catalog files match own fixtures). Plus 4 lower-severity fixes folded in.

describe.confidence_note: Description converged extensively in conversation; gates pass at 5/5 each; scope and constraints fully tabled.

specify.confidence_note: Rev2: all 6 fixes addressed (F1 hookify→shell hook, F2 EXCLUDE_PATHS, F3 silent→rm-rf swap, F4 events cap, F5 safe-swap fallback, F7 file-level copy). One inline correction during re-pass (stdin contract). Spec is implementation-ready.

challenge.confidence_note: Vanilla mode found 2 critical (F1, F2) + 4 lower-severity findings. Rev2 spec passes re-run with READY verdict (one inline correction applied).

edge_cases.confidence_note: Vanilla edge-cases pass: 4 low-severity findings (E7, E10, E15, E19) folded into Risks/Known Limitations without regression. No critical findings, no architectural changes implied.

premortem.confidence_note: Pre-mortem found 3 NEW operational findings (F-PM-1 heartbeat, F-PM-2 stale nudge, F-PM-3 durable summary). 0% overlap with adversarial — operational lens earned its keep. Folded inline into spec; no regression. AC11 + AC12 added.

review.confidence_note: /review wizard run with 4-lens analysis. 16 findings (3H/4M/9L). 12 inline-addressed, 4 deferred. No regression — all HIGH findings were framing not mechanism. Spec promoted to rev3 with new Decisions section, references[] schema field, E20 dedupe in sweep step 5, E23 vault outside timeout, DA-3 mirror contract header, AC13+AC14 added. WU6 has visibility verification as pre-impl gating step (DA-1).

test.confidence_note: Spec-blind tests generated covering all 14 ACs + 7 preservation contracts + 13 failure modes. Bash-based, slot into existing test.sh + evals/evals.json + scripts/behavioral-smoke.sh infrastructure. AC14 explicitly flagged as partially spec-blind (form-1 unit-testable, form-2 requires harness-empirical verification — gating step before WU6). Test execution order suggested for Execute stage.

execute.blocked_reason: AC14 form-2 verification revealed exit 0 + stderr does NOT propagate to Claude (rev3 spec design failed). additionalContext via stdout JSON is the correct mechanism (docs confirm, in-session unverifiable due to settings cache). Spec needs rev4 polish: change hook output from stderr to stdout JSON. Other WUs unblocked. See ac14-verification.md.
gating_findings: DA-1 confirmed: warn-only stderr invisible to Claude
rev4 polish required on spec.md hook contract section + tests.md AC14 unit-test form
